channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Chiefs wide receiver Xavier Worthy released after Texas district attorney declines to pursue charges
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Xavier Worthy was released Saturday after a district attorney in Texas declined to pursue charges against the Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver following an arrest in which he had been accused of felony domestic violence.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dunn scores 25, Penn State beats No. 12 Wisconsin 86-75
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — D’Marco Dunn had 25 points and Yanic Konan Niederhauser added 15 points and 11 rebounds as Penn State rallied in the second half for an 86-75 victory over No. 12 Wisconsin on Saturday, preventing the Badgers from clinching a double bye in the Big Ten Tournament.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Aggies dominate Air Force in regular season finale
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Mason Falslev scored 18 points on 8-of-10 shooting to lead the Utah State basketball team to a dominating 87-47 win over Air Force. The Aggies finish the regular season with a record of 25-6 overall, 15-5 in the Mountain West Conference.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Barcelona's Spanish league game is postponed after death of team doctor
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Barcelona’s home game against Osasuna in the Spanish league was postponed on Saturday after the death of first-team doctor Carles Miñarro Garcia. Fans were informed of the decision around 15 minutes before the game was scheduled to kick off at 9 p.m.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bubble watch: Georgia is in position to end 10-year NCAA Tournament drought after beating Vanderbilt
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Asa Newell spoke with confidence after Georgia's 79-68 win over Vanderbilt on Saturday when he proclaimed, “We're going to be dancing.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Sweet Sixteen: Liverpool's lead in Premier League grows to 16 points as ailing Man City loses again
item.description: Liverpool's lead in the Premier League has grown to 16 points. Mohamed Salah's lead in the Golden Boot contest is up to seven goals.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ejiofor's buzzer-beater in OT gives No. 6 St. John's an 86-84 win over No. 20 Marquette
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Zuby Ejiofor hit a tiebreaking shot at the buzzer, Kadary Richmond got the first St. John’s triple-double this century and the sixth-ranked Red Storm beat No. 20 Marquette 86-84 in overtime Saturday for their sixth consecutive victory. St.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Brad Marchand plays for the Florida Panthers. It's a move that the Panthers never saw coming
item.description: Aleksander Barkov looked across the Florida Panthers’ locker room on Saturday morning and noticed a new addition.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lakers fan who hit $100,000 halfcourt shot says he will use money to pay for wedding
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers fan who the the $100,000 dollar halfcourt shot during the Lakers-New York Knicks game on Thursday plans to spend his winnings wisely.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blackhawks in action against the Predators following overtime victory
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (20-35-8, in the Central Division) vs. Nashville Predators (23-32-7, in the Central Division) Nashville, Tennessee; Saturday, 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Basketball: Mater Dei Catholic 59, Carlsbad 52
item.description: Mater Dei Catholic winning and advancing to the Division III State Regional semifinals, 59-52 over Carlsbad,
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Kenwood girls and boys basketball squads looking to make school history together
item.description: The Kenwood Girls Basketball team defeated Alton 61-55 Friday afternoon at the IHSA Class 4A semifinal to advance to the school’s first state championship game.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Utah keeps rolling with 4-2 victory at Detroit
item.description: DETROIT (ABC4 Sports) - Karel Vejmelka made 38 saves for the Utah Hockey Club, who scored three straight goals to rally for a 4-2 win against the Detroit Red Wings at Little Caesars Arena on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Francisco State University cutting men's soccer and 2 other sports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- San Francisco State University announced plans on Thursday to cut three sports programs as part of its budget planning. The announced cuts follow a budget meeting last week that was "particularly difficult," according to an open letter posted by SFSU President Lynn Mahoney.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Shorthanded Jazz lose to last place Wizards, 125-122
item.description: WASHINGTON, D.C. (ABC4 Sports) - Kyshawn George scored 23 points, Alex Sarr added 21 and the Washington Wizards edged the Utah Jazz 125-122 on Wednesday night in a battle of two last place teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Carlsbad 59, Fairmont Prep 55
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- 2025 CIF State Boys Basketball Championships Division I Carlsbad defeated Fairmont Prep 59-55. The visitors made the trek from Anaheim, and they could not slow down UCSD commit Jake Hall who hit for a game high 32 points for the Lancers.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Reports: Bears trade for all-pro Chiefs OL Joe Thuney
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have reportedly traded for four-time Super Bowl champion guard Joe Thuney from the Chiefs. According to multiple reports, the Bears are sending back a 2026 fourth-round pick for the 32-year-old guard.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls guard, Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu to have shoulder surgery, out for season, team announces
item.description: CHICAGO — The 2024-25 season is over for Bulls guard and Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu. The team announced Sunday morning the fourth-year player and former University of Illinois star will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
